data.answer: The borrower is compliant for 2014Q2 with a Leverage Ratio of 3.606x, below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x, providing headroom of +0.144x [7]. The Device Strategy addback of $100 was permitted out of $130 in charges, with $30 disallowed under the lifetime cap of $290 [10].
